bulk.title: Bulk Invite
bulk.dropzone: Drop a CSV file here or click to select
bulk.dropzoneHint: One handle per line, or CSV with a “handle” column
step.welcome.title: Welcome to {{name}}
step.welcome.overview: Here's a quick overview of how decisions are made.
step.voting.title: How Voting Works
step.voting.timeline: Every vote follows a structured timeline:
step.voting.deliberation_one: Deliberation: {{count}} day to discuss and propose amendments.
step.voting.deliberation_other: Deliberation: {{count}} days to discuss and propose amendments.
step.voting.curation_one: Curation: {{count}} day for the panel to review and finalize proposals.
step.voting.curation_other: Curation: {{count}} days for the panel to review and finalize proposals.
step.voting.votingDays_one: Voting: {{count}} day to cast your vote.
step.voting.votingDays_other: Voting: {{count}} days to cast your vote.
step.voting.secretBallot: Ballots are secret — results are revealed only after voting closes.
step.voting.allowVoteChange: You can change your vote at any time before voting closes.
step.delegation.title: Delegation
step.delegation.intro: You don't have to vote on everything.
step.delegation.candidacy: You can delegate your vote to declared candidates who have published their positions.
step.delegation.open: You can delegate your vote to any member you trust.
step.delegation.topicScoped: Delegations can be scoped by topic — different delegates for different subjects.
step.delegation.override: You always keep the final say: voting directly on any question automatically overrides your delegation for that question.
step.features.title: Beyond Voting
step.features.intro: Your voice matters beyond just voting:
step.features.communityNotes: Community notes let members add context and fact-checks to proposals and candidate profiles. Notes become visible after enough members evaluate them.
step.features.surveys: Surveys capture member observations — what's working, what isn't. This evidence feeds into accountability and helps inform future decisions.
step.features.predictions: Predictions let members forecast outcomes before votes close, building a track record of judgment over time.
step.start.title: Getting Started
step.start.ready: You're all set. Here's what you can do now:
step.start.browseDashboard: Browse active votes and upcoming proposals on the dashboard.
step.start.setupDelegations: Set up your delegations — choose people you trust to vote on your behalf.
step.start.exploreMembers: Explore the member list to see who's in this group.
invite.youveBeenInvited: You've been invited to join this group
invite.governancePermanent: Governance rules are permanent and apply to all votes in this group.
invite.approvalHint: An admin will review your request before you can participate.
invite.loginToRequest: Log in to request to join
invite.noAccount: Don't have an account? You'll be able to create one.
invite.requestSentMessage: Your request to join <bold>{{name}}</bold> has been sent. An admin will review it shortly.
